11.content: How old will our girl be?

113.content:
There was a car leaving the city with a family inside of it. The members of this family were a married couple, Jennifer and Hal, and her young daughter Nicole. Nicole was a ten year old with long white hair and red eyes, due to her appearance, she was pretty popular among the other kids, however, everything was about to change.

"Mom, I don't want to stay with grandma Rita." Nicole laments.

"Nicole, you need to understand, your father and I got a deal to travel around the world to film the cultures within it for two years. We discussed and realized that it wasn't the appropriate environment for a child." Jennifer responds.

"Besides, kid. Your grandma really needs this, you know, ever since your grandpa Joey passed away, she has been living alone in that cabin." Her dad replies.

However, she simply ignored them and lay down on the back seat of the car, hoping that this was just a dream. The next morning, Nicole wakes up and hears a discussion outside of the car.

"No, please, son. You really don't have to."

"Mom, I insist." Hal replies. "It's unfair that we drop our daughter here and not give you some money for you and her."

But they stopped as the three of them see Nicole getting out of the car.

"Good morning Nikki." Her dad says. "How about you say hello to your grandma?"

Nicole rolled her eyes and kissed her grandma on the cheek. "Hi, grandma Lucy."

"Hi, sweetie. You really have grown up now, huh?" Her grandma smiles.

"Kind of." She responds, pretending to laugh..

"Is everything okay, mom?" Hal asks, noticing how Lucy was staring at his daughter.

With this, the old woman gets out of trance. "I'm okay, it's just that Nicole's face reminds me of someone. I can't remember who, though."

"Maybe she looks like you when you were younger."

Lucy shakes her head. "Forget it, maybe it's just the ravings of an old woman."

"Anyway, it's getting late for our flight, so it's time to move." Jennifer says. "I'm sorry, Nicole. For not taking you with us, but, it's for the best." She hugs her. "I'm going to miss you."

The girl sighed, even if she was mad at the current events, she was going to miss them, too.

After a few hours since her parents left, Nicole was trying to receive a wi-fi signal on her phone, but it was useless.

"Nicole." She hears her grandma calling her. "Food is served."

The white haired girl gets out of her new bedroom and walks downstairs.

"Here you are." Lucy serves a plate. "Hurry, before it gets cold."

Nicole starts to eat and wonders what she could do around here. "Hey, grandma. Is there a mall in this town?"

"Sorry, dear. There isn't one, but, there are a few interesting places. Why don't you go and check them?"

"Really? But, shouldn't you come with me?" Nicole asks back.

"Not at all. It's safe to walk alone around here, besides, I would be a burden for you. Go ahead and get used in the zone." Her grandma replies.

The girl finishes her meal. "Okay, then. I'll go outside." She leaves the living room.

"Sure, have a good time."

Nicole steps outside and walks towards the town, she keeps walking by, unitl a place catches her sight....

1133.content:
Nicole saw in the distance, a cave, located next to the seashore. She enjoyed visiting this sort of locations with her friends, but, for obvious reasons, she is going alone this time.

Reaching the cave, the white haired girl was about to enter.

"I wouldn't do that if I were you." She turns around and sees a tanned girl, short black hair, probably around her age, standing outside, wearing a top tank, shorts and sandals.

"Why? Is it dangerous?"

"Well, not really, but trust me. You shouldn't." The unknown girl comments.

Nicole rolled her eyes, she thought that this was a prank or something. "Eh, I'll go take a look." She walks inside.

"Wait." The other girl wants to stop her, but it was too late. She sighs. "At least, no one is here to make the announcement."

However, the tanned girl sees a group of boys, starting a fire. "Hey, what do you think you are doing?"

"What else? Making the ceremonial fire for the purity girl."

"No, no, you are wrong. She probably just came here for holidays."

"So? Holidays or not, the adults told us to announce every time a person goes into the traditional cave." Another boy says.

"Besides, if you are worried about her, you should go too. Two purity girls are better than one." The boys laughed.

The tanned girl went back to the cave's entrance and thought about it.

Meanwhile, with Nicole.....
1133.title: A cave near the seashore

choices: Her clothes had turned to dust
There was a strange mark on her skin
The tan girl was in there with her
11331.content:
Deep within the cave, Nicole stumbled upon a giant chamber made completely of sparkling white crystals. The sheer beauty of the place was almost blinding.

"Wow..." Nicole had never seen anything like it. Why had the other girl tried to stop her from coming here? This place was amazing!

Even as she thought that, the crystals began to shine brighter and brighter. Soon their light was completely blinding. Nicole clutched her eyes in shock. "Aaaaagh!"

It took several minutes before she could open her eyes again, but when she did, she discovered that...
11331.title: Crystals

choices: "Yes, she was with me." (She has to join her.)
113312.content:
"What is this?" Nicole sees a strange mark behind one of her hands. She tried to rub it off, but the mark was still on her skin. "Okay, this doesn't look like a temporary tattoo."

Suddenly, she started hearing some noises at the distance. "Drums?" She thought and moved towards the entrance of the cave.

Surprisingly, Nicole was greeted by a crowd outside of the cavern, celebrating and clapping at her.

"What is going on?" The teenager asks.

"A miracle." An old man responds. "Let me introduce myself, I'm Richard Louis, the man in charge of this village. And what's your name?"

"Nicole Williams." She hesitates to reply. "And why are you here?"

"You just revived an old tradition of our village. The purity ritual was something no one dared to volunteer in decades." Richard explains. "And from what I can see you even got approved by the crystals spirits." He sees the mark on her hand.

"Oh, yes." Nicole smiles, realizing that maybe she could take advantage of this, they probably will reward her or treat her like an idol.

"Now, it's time to finish the ceremony. Could you please raise your arms and close your eyes?"

The white haired girl does it and closes her eyes, waiting for everyone to kneel before her.

"Okay, boys. Please remove her clothing." The old man announces.

"Do what now?" Nicole can barely react as the kids run and quickly undress her. "Hey, what do you think you are doing? Stop it."

"Looks like the spirits really liked you, you have more than 1 mark." Nicole sees herself and notices a big mark on her belly.

"She has one on her back, too." The tanned girl appears behind her.

Nicole was mad, so mad, she didn't know how to express it. "You planned this, didn't you?" She asks the tanned girl.

"Don't try to blame me, I told you to not go there."

"Yeah, right." Nicole sarcastically says.

One of the boys notices the tension between the two and whispers an idea to the others.

"Sir." A kid calls. "I saw Hannah going into the cave, too. But she got out before the spirits could mark her."

"Yeah, me too." Another boy says.

"Uh huh, I saw her, too."

"No, I didn't." Hannah responds.

"Easy, everybody. Nicole was chosen. She has the last word." Richard walk towards her. "Is that true?"

Nicole stared at Hannah and said
113312.title: There was a strange mark on her skin

1133121.content:
Nicole was feeling vindictive at the moment. She couldn't shake the feeling that the other girl had somehow planned this, even though rationally it probably didn't make any sense.

That was why she stared at Hannah with a smirk as she proclaimed "Oh yeah, she totally followed me in. I saw her just before I went in the crystal room. The spirits must've scared her off."

"Wait, what? No, she's lying!" Hannah protested.

"Now, Hannah. A purity girl shouldn't lie." Richard reprimanded her. "Boys, remove Hannah's clothes as well."

Hannah glared angrily at Nicole as she realized that there was no getting out this for her. She didn't make it easy for them, but soon the tanned girl had been stripped completely bare as well.

"Now then, girls." Richard began "Allow me to show you..."
1133121.title: "Yes, she was with me." (She has to joi...

choices: She cries. "Why did you do it?"
11331211.content:
"It's been quite a while since it's been used, but, I think it will be ready in a couple of hours." The old man comments, guiding them to an old temple at the top of a mountain.

"Wait, are we going to live here?" Nicole asks.

"Of course, purity maidens are considered to be the link between the spiritual realm and us, also, you are now the protectors of our village." Richard replies. "Living here will grant you the ability to communicate with the spirits in a certain point."

"Really? That sounds cool." Nicole still feels embarrassed, but, she was trying to see the bright side. While Hannah was simply following them, ignoring any word that was coming from the leader.

"The temple has a bathhouse, three bedrooms and a meditation garden. You can bring your stuff and move here tomorrow if you want."

"Thank you, sir." Nicole says.

"Then I guess we are done for today. You can go home now." Richard finishes.

While the purity maidens were going down the mountain, Nicole realized that maybe she messed up by involving Hannah into this, after all, she warned her and still blamed her for this situation.

"Listen, Hannah." Nicole rubs the back of her head. "I'm really sorry for lying and making you a purity girl."

How does Hannah react?
11331211.title: Your new living quarters

choices: A little boy walking towards them, but something was off
113312111.content:
This comment didn't resonate with the other girl as she expected, because the next thing she saw was a fist on her face.

"Aw, my nose!" She rubs it. "You know what? I deserve it." Nicole admits.

"No, you deserve way more than that." Hannah shakes her hand. "If that's all you have to say." The tanned girl keeps walking down the mountain.

"Wait." Nicole holds her hand. "I know I put us in this mess, but maybe we can work together."

"Sure, how about you work during the day and I do the night shift?" She replies. "That way I can avoid seeing your face."

"Please, don't be so harsh to me." Nicole hugs her. "Besides, aren't you a bit curious about the spirits?"

Hannah feels the white haired girl's hands on her chest and sets free. "Nicole, that's a bunch of lies, I've been living here my whole life and I never heard of ghosts, spirits or goblins." She blushes. "Now, I need to go home, my parents must be worried about me."

But, Nicole runs ahead of her and blocks the path. "Not until you forgive me and promise to be my friend."

"Move or I'll punch you."

"Then do it." She closes her eyes. "After all, you just said I deserve more."

Hannah is about to hit her a second time, but stops at the last second and sighs. "I don't want to, I'm saving energy for the boys of the village tomorrow."

"So, does that mean?" Nicole smiles.

"Yeah, I forgive you." She passes her. "This doesn't mean we are friends."

"Thank you, Hannah." Nicole walks next to her, however, she feels something was watching them at the distance. "Wait, I need to check something." She grabs a stone a throws it at the nearby trees, they wait a few seconds before they see.....
113312111.title: She punches Nicole.

115.title: More ages

1151.content:
"Wait are you waiting for, Alex?" Jasmine teases her cousin. "Do it."

Alexia is a 12 year old girl, her friends call her Alex, she was a redhead and had skin as white as milk, small breasts and long hair. Her personality was like any other girl, except she was more reserved, she avoided changing her clothes in front of other girls and even her own mother when she turned 7 and didn't talk too much with boys.

This summer, she and her family saved money to take a cruise, but, they didn't expect someone else joining their trip, Erica, her 14 year old cousin. She was a brunette with green eyes and way more developed, mentally and physically, than Alexia.

"Okay, girls." Alexia's father says. "I think it's time to go to sleep." He hands the key of their room to Erica. "Our rooms are in the same deck, if you need us, just knock."

"Sure, uncle Kenny." The brunette replies. "Have a good night."

The two girls opened their room and stepped in.

"Well." Erica sits on her bed and removes her shoes and socks. "We should play a game."

Alexia sighed, she knew what was going to happen, her cousin usually forced her to play any sort of games to do a dare at the end.

"I couldn't bring a bottle, so I guess we can play this." Erica takes out a UNO card game.

"What will happen to the loser this time?" Alexia asks.

"Hmm, I don't know." The brunette girl says. "How about the loser has to do anything the winner says?"

The readhead rolled her eyes and started to play, a few games later, Erica was the winner. "Alright, I won."

"Yeah, yeah. What do you want me to do?" Alexia crosses her arms.

"I guess we can try something new." Erica smirks. "I want your clothes here." She points to her bed.

Alexia blushes. "No way, I'm not going to undress here."

"Rules are rules, cousin." The brunette responds.

Alexia groans and removes her purple blouse along with a white skirt and puts it on her cousin's bed. "There, I did it."

Erica laughs. "I see that you are still wearing your underwear, hurry or I'm going to add more to your dare."

"But I have never been naked in front of someone else before."

The brunette pretends not to hear her. "What are you waiting for, Alex? Do it."

Alexia closed her eyes and pulled her panties, removed her bra and quicky covered herself.

"There you go. It was easy, right?" Then an idea pop up in Erica's head. "How about we go outside to take some fresh air?"

11511.content:
Alexia resisted Erica's attempts to leave the room with her.

"No way! I can't go out there naked!"

"Come on, I won fair and square! Stop whining!"

But this time, Alex wouldn't be convinced. Eventually, Erica resorted to pulling her cousin out of the room by force.

"Noooo!" Alexia screamed as she squirmed in the older girl's grip.

"Come... on... Alex!" Erica grunted out as she pulled.

At that moment, however, tragedy stuck. Erica pulled her cousin a little too hard, and the excess weight made her stumble backwards. At the same time, Alexia continued to squirm, loosening Erica's grip. As Erica backed into the railing of the cruise ship's deck, Alexia finally broke free. However, instead of falling to the deck, she fell over the railing and off the ship entirely.

The last thing Alexia heard before losing consciousness was Erica calling her name in a panic.

When she woke up, she was...
11511.title: Conflict and stranded.

choices: Only wild animals, she is. in an isolated island.
A camp, but doesn't mean her luck is getting better.
115113.content:
"Ah, my head." Alexia wakes up in an unknown shore. "Where am I?" The redhead lifts her head and observes palms, a jungle and a volcano at the distance.

"Is anyone here" She stands covered in sand. "Mom? Dad? Erica?" She shouts, looking for any signs of life, but she could only hear her voice echoing. Alexia sits on the sand and realizes she was still naked, looking behind her and in the rest of the beach, she was all alone, so she decided to not worry about her nudity.

"I'm stranded on an island." She freaks out."Don't worry, probably my parents already know about what happened, but I can't stay like this when the rescue team shows up."

Alexia stands. "I need to find some clothes." She stares at the jungle. "Please, god. Let me find people who can help me." She prays and walks into the palms and bushes. The teenage girl moves throughout the jungle and finds.......
115113.title: On an unfamiliar beach

1152.content:
Karen was your average teenager, she was thirteen years old with a tomboyish personality and she was in her last year of middle school.

Today, her parents went out to celebrate their anniversary, she only had to take care of her 6 year old brother, Kyle.

Karen was in her bedroom, preparing everything to take a shower, when her brother step in.

"I want to play video games." Kyle exclaimed.

"Mom told me to not give you permission until you finished your soup, and you drop it." She said.

"I don't like soup, I want to play!" He demanded.

"Sorry, Kyle, not my problem."

Upset, Kyle dropped to the floor and threw a tantrum to obtain what he wanted, Karen simply ignored him and went to the bathroom. Knowing that he wouldn't play video games, he decided to play with her sister.

Water flows through the shower, covering Karen's small breasts and her recently sprouted brown pubic hairs, as she washes her short hair with shampoo, she hears knocking at the bathroom's door.

"Karen, I need to go to the bathroom." Kyle said.

"Can you wait a little more? I'm almost done." She responded.

"I can't, please?"

A bit tired of dealing with her brother, she accepted, closing the curtain to avoid any visual contact. Meanwhile, Kyle pretends to do his business, takes his sister's dirty clothes and her towel. He thanks her and leaves.

A few minutes later, Karen dries her hair and realizes she is missing something. "Damn brat." she thought, Kyle has seen her naked before, so, she didn't hesitate to leave the bathroom to get dressed, however, she saw that her clean clothes were gone. "He is asking for it." she looks for clothes in cabinets, completely empty. "That's it." she races to find him, fortunately, he was playing video games in the living room.

Mad at him, Karen unplugs the console, "Where are my clothes?", "Mom told me to not give you clothes." he mocks her and starts to laugh. with only anger on her head, Karen grabs Kyle and takes his clothes off, after that, she spanks him until she makes him cry.

"What are the hell are you doing?" Karen looks behind her and noticed that her parents were home.

11521.content:
"This isn't what it looks like.." Karen stops the spanking.

"Go to your room, right now!" her father orders.

After 40 minutes, Karen waits in her bed.

"Karen." she hears her mother's voice, "We want to hear your side of the story."

Coming back, Karen tells them everything.

Her father sighs, "It's not easy to say this, but, I don't believe you."

"What?, Why?" Karen asks, "I'm telling you the truth."

"Well, your story doesn't match with Kyle's version."

"And why are you taking his side as the truth?"

"Because we have evidence." her mother says, showing Karen's underwear and the rest of her dirty clothes. "We found these spread all around the front door. Also, the folks next door called us, their kid say she saw you undressing outside."

"She is lying, she is friends with Kyle." she claims.

"Stop, Karen." her father said. "That's just the beginning. Kyle told us that you started to show your body to him and that you forced him to strip to see his crotch."

"WHAT!?" she exploded, "I never...."

"Listen, honey." her mother interrupted. "This is a really sick. I mean, you are siblings."

"But, he is lying." Tears start to form in her eyes. "I would never do that."

"Then, why are you still naked?"

She forgot about her nudity and covers herself, "Because Kyle stole my clothes. My room is empty."

"Okay, I'll give you one chance, if we go to your room and I see at least one sock, you'll face the consequences of your acts." her father announces.

Karen was more relaxed with this, not even Kyle would return all of her clothes in time, however, as she opens the door, they observe a pile of clothes on her bed, the ones she had chosen before bathing.

"So, you were saying.." her mother waits for her response.

"He left them there, take a look at this." she pulls out a cabinet, completely full of panties.

"I've seen enough, your mother and I will discuss about this." Both looked disappointed at Karen and leave the room.

Karen doesn't know what to do, so, she dresses and cries against her pillow. Kyle at the distance feels bad, he only wanted to prank his sister, but, if he admitted anything, the punishment will be worse for him. For now, he left a bag with the rest of her clothes outside of Karen's room as some kind of apology.

In the living room, their parents debate about Karen's situation, " It's decided then, in the morning, I'll take Kyle to the zoo and you'll do this with Karen." Both agreed and go to sleep.
11521.title: Our poor little baby.

115212.content:
The next day.

"Please, mom." Karen begs, "Anything but that."

"Don't try to convince me, young lady." her mother says, "You were loud and clear, you want to stay naked, so, I'm getting rid of your clothes." she puts Karen's underwear in cardboard boxes. "That's odd, the rest of your cabinets are empty."

"I told you, it's Kyle's fault." Karen replies

"Blaming your brother again? He left with your father 10 minutes ago." she walks outside of the room and notices a big bag, "I'm not sure how should I trust you, with your words or with your actions." she takes out a blouse out of the bag and shows it to her daughter. "Well, it's definitive then."

"It wasn't me." Karen cries.

"Hurry, Karen, all that is left is what you are wearing, I need to sell everything, people buy a lot of second-hand clothing."

Karen knew this was an dead-end, her mother gives her a box and she proceeds to strip from everything.

"Okay, I'm going downtown to sell these, your father and Kyle will be there."

"And what am I going to do?" Karen asks.

"Whatever you want, it's Saturday, you can even go outside."

Putting all the boxes in her car, Karen's mom leaves her, devastated from what happened. Karen cries some more, and tries to think what she should do next.

Moments later, two kids show up at her front door, they were Karen best friends, Chloe, a blonde girl who wears glasses, she is shy and a little clumsy, and Michael, he is a member of the soccer team, in which Karen was part of it, he is energetic and likes to hang out Chloe and Karen.

"Are you sure she wanted to see us?" Michael asks Chloe, "I'm sure, she even sounded sad.", hearing that, Michael knocks, worried for his friend.

"Who is it?", "It's us, Karen." he responds, "Okay, but, you need to close your eyes." both were confused, and more intrigued about Karen, they do as instructed and Karen guides them inside the house.

"Can we open them now?" Chloe said, "No." Karen replies, "I need to ask you something, if I was different, would you still be my friends?"

"Of course." Chloe responds, "Wait, different how?" Michael asks, "In the way I dress." she replies, "What, now you want to act more girly with dresses and skirts?" Michael giggles, "Shut up." Karen kicks him in the leg, "Ouch, watch it, that hurt." Michael opens his eyes, seeing Karen standing naked in front of them.

"I told you to keep your eyes closed, pervert!!" Karen blushes, "What is happening?" Chloe also opens her eyes, "Karen!, what happened?".

She does a quick recap of everything until this point.

"Wow, so, you can't wear anything?" Michael asks.

"No, thanks to Kyle I'm staying like this." Karen says, covering her almost non-existent breasts.

"I'm really sorry." Chloe comments, "School will be more tough now."

"Yeah, Chloe, thanks for remind me." Karen replies, "I wanted to tell you guys because I don't know what to do."

"How about we go to....
115212.title: Consequences and friends.

1152121.content:
"How about we go to the lake?" Michael proposes, "Going there always cheers you up."

"I'm not going anywhere naked." Karen replied, "Do you even listen to me?"

"Hey, I do." he said. "But, we can't do anything if your parents decided to sell your clothes."

"He is right. Maybe we should go, that way you can feel better about your nudity." Chloe comments.

"I won't." she angrily replies. "If you guys don't have any ideas besides being outside, then you can leave right now." she walks to the front door, opening it for them.

Michael whispers something to Chloe and goes towards Karen.

"Fine, we are leaving." he said. "By the way, Karen, since you are the only girl on the soccer team, a lot of guys wanted to do something with you."

"And what's that?" Karen then feels Michael's hands touching her breasts.

"This." he replies, running to the sidewalk.

"Michael Smith." Karen said. "You are so dead." she blushes.

"Oh, scary!" he pretends to be scared, "If you are so mad, then come and get me." However, as he finishes, he sees Karen within a few steps from him.

"Shit." he starts to run away from Karen.

With those two racing, Chloe closes the house. "I can't believe he did it." she smiles.

A marathon later, Michael stops.

"Hear me out, Karen." he avoids her. "I was kidding."

"Very funny." she responds, "I'll remember it when I use your head as a soccer ball."

"I'm serious. Look where we are."

Karen sees trees around, they reached to the lake.

"You made me leave my house." Karen covers.

"It was the only way. You are going to stay naked pretty much everywhere." Michael explains. "The least we could do was to make you feel better."

Karen sighs. "Okay, I don't like that you tricked me to leave, but, I guess I should apologize for being mean before."

"It's okay." Chloe extends her hand. "If one of us passed through this, you would do the same."

Karen realizes how her friends were worried about her.

"Well, since we are here, I guess I can swim a little." she says.

"And don't worry." Michael speaks. "We will take our clothes, too." He pulls his underwear down.

"No thanks, with me is enough." Karen chuckles and enjoys the rest of the day at the lake with her friends.
1152121.title: To the lake.

11521211.content:
After enjoying a Saturday evening with her friends and not going anywhere in Sunday, Karen is left at the entrance of middle school.

Embarrassed and holding a notebook in each hand to hide her chest and crotch, she walks in the hall to meet Michael and Chloe in her classroom.

"Good morning." she said, moving awkwardly into her desk to avoid any flashing to the rest of the class.

"Hi." Michael replies. "How was the rest of your weekend?"

".When I got home, Kyle asked me to forgive him." she comments. "I couldn't say no, I know he wasn't that evil."

"But, did you tell your parents?" Chloe asks.

"I want to, but, they won't believe me and even if Kyle admits it, they might think I forced him."

"You are really stuck like this, aren't you?" Chloe rubs the back of her head. "I guess taking you to the lake didn't work either."

"No, it did." Karen responds. "If it wasn't for you, maybe I wouldn't even step out of my house. It's just that I can't pretend I'm not naked."

"Right." Michael agrees. "At least, it can't get worse."

"OH MY GOSH!" the three see Louise, the most popular girl in the school, approaching them. "So the rumors were true, you aren't wearing clothes."

"Hi, Louise, nice to see you too." Karen rolls her eyes.

"I can't believe it, you wanted to take the spotlight from me that you came in the nude. I didn't know you were the type who liked the attention." she chuckles. "But, I know this is the best idea you could come up with, like, what else should I be expecting from the least feminine girl in school?"

Karen was short-tempered so this was enough to trigger her.

"I'm not enjoying this, you know. And I couldn't care less about you and your "fame", so, how about you go to your seat with the rest of your bitchy friends and shut up before I beat your ass."

All the eyes were focused on Alice, she stayed quiet and left, not before giving Karen a menacing look.

"Damn, you put her down." Michael comments.

"Yeah, it was very brave." Chloe adds.

"Thanks." Karen holds a notebook against her small breasts, still worried about her situation.

"Okay, everyone, sit down." The principal, Mr. Olsen, appears. "I have an announcement to make, as you may have noticed, Karen Mason is attending classes naked. This is due to a personal decision of hers and her parents. So, I would like you to be comprehensible to her." he explains other details and leaves for regular classes.

Karen blushed during the whole speech and hoped that everything would be normal from now on.
11521211.title: Monday in school.

115212112.content:
The bell rings, marking the end of classes, Karen and Michael prepare for soccer practice while Chloe goes to her club.

"Move, Karen, we are late." Michael pressures.

"I can't, it's not easy running like this." she uses her hands to cover her privates.

With their efforts, they are able to make it in time.

Blowing his whistle, the coach asks for all players to get in the field.

"Okay, everybody.." then he stops, looking at Karen. "What happened to you?" he asks.

"The principal didn't tell you about my situation." she responds, embarrassed because everybody's attention was on her.

"Really? I thought he was kidding. Whatever, let's begin, the cup is almost here." the confused coach gives orders and starts.

After a while, the coach groans and blows his whistle again.

"Okay, everyone take 5 minutes, Karen, could you please come with me?" he asks her.

Walking enough distance from the field, the coach faces her.

"This is not easy to tell. But, you're out, Karen." he laments.

"What? Coach, I can still play soccer." she says. "I know, 10 minutes after you hurt your feet." he responds, "I just need to get used to play barefoot." she replies.

"It's not only that, kid, the team is not concentrating." he explains. "You, and Smith were the only ones focusing, the rest was paying attention to you."

"But, I can't help it." she complains. "Please, couch, this is the only sport I'm good at." she feels tears in her eyes.

"I'm sorry, I made my choice, I never thought I would say this to one of my best players." he finishes. "So, hit the showers and go home." he leaves her.

Karen started to cry and ran towards the locker room. Michael tried to talk to her, but, the coach restarted and he stayed.

Depressed and forgetting about her state, Karen walks out of her school.

"Are you already leaving?" Louise asks, waiting in front of a limo. "Mind your own business, Louise." Karen replies.
